pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh script and environment scripts loading /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/run.sumocfg. The scenario files represent the real-world traffic network of the Acosta area in Bologna, Italy.

privileged_info_summary: The task successfully launches the sumo-gui application loaded with the real-world 'bologna_acosta' scenario. The data is non-synthetic, based on actual infrastructure and traffic patterns in the Acosta area of Bologna, Italy.
